title: scrophularia vernalis var. cordata
intro: Scrophularia vernalis var. cordata, also known as heartleaf figwort or cordate-leaved figwort, is a plant species belonging to the figwort family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Scrophularia vernalis var. cordata can be found in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to support respiratory health and treat skin conditions.
